name: Artichoke Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine equal amounts of Parmesan cheese and mayonnaise in a bowl.
2. Add garlic powder to the mixture.
3. Stir in the artichoke hearts until combined with the cheese mixture.
4. Serve cold or heat for 10 to 20 minutes at 350°F in an oven.
5. Allow the cheese to melt (do not heat in the microwave).
6. Serve with chips or as a spread on French bread.
